ns0:entry.ns0:title: Michael-A-Kuykendall/shimmy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Michael-A-Kuykendall/shimmy
Language: rust
⚡ Pure-Rust WebGPU inference engine — OpenAI-API compatible, GGUF native, runs on any GPU. No Python. No llama.cpp. Single binary.

Language: rust
A smarter cd command. Supports all major shells.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloud-hypervisor/cloud-hypervisor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloud-hypervisor/cloud-hypervisor
Language: rust
A Virtual Machine Monitor for modern Cloud workloads. Features include CPU, memory and device hotplug, support for running Windows and Linux guests, device offload with vhost-user and a minimal compact footprint. Written in Rust with a strong focus on security.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cube-js/cube
Language: rust

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/foundry-rs/foundry
Language: rust
Foundry is a blazing fast, portable and modular toolkit for Ethereum application development written in Rust.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gitbutlerapp/gitbutler
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gitbutlerapp/gitbutler
Language: rust
The GitButler version control client, backed by Git, powered by Tauri/Rust/Svelte

ns0:entry.ns0:title: junhoyeo/tokscale
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/junhoyeo/tokscale
Language: rust
🛰️ A CLI tool for tracking token usage from OpenCode, Claude Code, 🦞OpenClaw (Clawdbot/Moltbot), Pi, Codex, Gemini, Cursor, AmpCode, Factory Droid, Kimi, and more! • 🏅Global Leaderboard + 2D/3D Contributions Graph

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lakehq/sail
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lakehq/sail
Language: rust
Drop-in Apache Spark replacement written in Rust, unifying batch processing, stream processing, and compute-intensive AI workloads.

URL: https://github.com/qdrant/qdrant

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ruvnet/RuView
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ruvnet/RuView
Language: rust
π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: stalwartlabs/stalwart
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/stalwartlabs/stalwart
Language: rust
All-in-one Mail & Collaboration server. Secure, scalable and fluent in every protocol (IMAP, JMAP, SMTP, CalDAV, CardDAV, WebDAV).
